paragraphs: The Press Council of Maharashtra (PCM) is a statutory autonomous body established to preserve the freedom of the press and maintain and improve the standards of newspapers and news agencies in Maharashtra.
Recognized by NITI Aayog and certified with ISO 9001:2015, PCM works towards promoting ethical journalism and providing guidance to media professionals.
PCM encourages transparency and professionalism within the media sector and provides a platform for resolving disputes related to journalism.
